overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair navigating Night City at night. The character walks through a covered underpass, emerges onto a neon-lit street, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and continues along the sidewalk. The environment features vibrant neon billboards, cyberpunk architecture, and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with teal ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered underpass with concrete walls and ceiling

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the underpass with exposed beams and teal lighting
rough concrete walls lining the underpass corridor
illuminated vending machine with colorful display

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, covered concrete underpass with teal ambient lighting. The corridor features rough concrete walls and a vending machine visible on the right side. The environment is enclosed with no sky visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor with stairs leading to street level

events.description: exits the covered underpass into a semi-open area with visible neon city lights ahead
lighting shifts from teal artificial to vibrant pink and purple neon illumination

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs while approaching the street level exit

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges leading upward
large illuminated billboard displaying WET DREAM text with anime-style character
metal handrails along the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends concrete stairs leading out of the underpass, transitioning from enclosed to semi-open space. Vibrant neon billboards including one for WET DREAM become visible ahead as the lighting shifts from teal to colorful neon. Metal handrails line the right side of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street corner with vehicle traffic and neon signage

events.description: reaches street level and emerges into the open urban intersection
futuristic white truck drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge observing traffic and neon signs, with blue hair visible

notable_agents.action: futuristic white truck driving along the street

entered.detail: large white futuristic truck with boxy design driving on the road
tall traffic light pole with illuminated signals
large holographic advertisement floating above buildings

segments.scene_description: The character reaches street level and enters a wide-open downtown intersection illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic billboards. A futuristic white truck passes by on the right while the character walks along the street edge. The environment features tall buildings with glass facades and various illuminated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk across multi-lane city street

events.description: character begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk
futuristic car passes through the intersection while crossing

agents.ego_description: walking across the multi-lane street using the yellow crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk signal on the opposite side

entered.detail: bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall commercial building with illuminated windows and signage
large planters with vegetation along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide street using a yellow-striped crosswalk. The intersection is busy with moderate pedestrian traffic and futuristic vehicles passing by. Commercial buildings with bright signage line the street, and planters with vegetation are visible along the approaching sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: steps onto the sidewalk after completing the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past storefronts and other pedestrians

entered.detail: glass entrance to a commercial building with illuminated interior
modern glass facade of the commercial building with reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues walking along the commercial street. The area features modern glass building facades, storefront entrances, and moderate pedestrian traffic. The neon-lit environment maintains the cyberpunk atmosphere with various illuminated signs and reflective wet surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a claustrophobic concrete underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins within a narrow corridor of rough concrete and teal ambient lighting, passing a lone vending machine before ascending a set of stairs. As the character climbs, the enclosed space opens up and the lighting shifts from dim teal to a vibrant glow, revealing towering neon billboards like WET DREAM. The scene then expands into a wide downtown intersection where the camera follows the character past a futuristic white truck and across a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a flow of holographic advertisements and glass facades. Finally, the movement settles onto a bustling commercial sidewalk, gliding past modern storefronts and reflective wet surfaces under the persistent glare of the cyberpunk skyline.
